categories.title: New Arrivals
categories.description: The latest pieces from our seasonal collections.

categories.title: Menswear
categories.description: Refined essentials and tailored pieces for the modern man.

categories.title: Womenswear
categories.description: Contemporary silhouettes crafted with premium fabrics.

categories.title: Essentials
categories.description: Wardrobe staples designed to last beyond seasons.

categories.title: Accessories
categories.description: Elevated finishing touches for every outfit.

products.title: Italian Wool Overcoat
products.shortDescription: Double-breasted overcoat in heavyweight Italian virgin wool.
products.longDescription: A commanding silhouette tailored from Loro Piana virgin wool. Features a notched lapel, double-breasted closure with horn buttons, fully lined interior in Bemberg cupro, and a back vent for ease of movement. The structured shoulders and mid-calf length create a timeless, authoritative look that transitions effortlessly from boardroom to evening.

reviews.text: Exceptional craftsmanship. The wool quality is extraordinary — warm without bulk. Worth every cent.
Exactly the investment piece I was looking for. The camel color is rich and sophisticated.

products.title: Minimalist Linen Shirt
products.shortDescription: Relaxed-fit shirt in washed European linen.
products.longDescription: Cut from premium Belgian linen with a lived-in softness from the first wear. Features a band collar, mother-of-pearl buttons, curved hem, and a relaxed silhouette that drapes beautifully. Pre-washed for zero shrinkage. The perfect warm-weather essential that only improves with age.

reviews.text: The linen is impeccable. Band collar adds a refined edge to a relaxed piece.
Beautiful drape and softness. Runs slightly oversized which I love.

products.title: Structured Wool Blazer
products.shortDescription: Single-breasted blazer in Japanese wool-blend fabric.
products.longDescription: Precision-tailored from a Japanese wool-polyester blend with natural stretch. Notch lapel, two-button closure, patch pockets, and a half-canvas construction for shape that holds over time. Interior features a signature striped lining and internal media pocket. A cornerstone of the modern wardrobe.

reviews.text: The half-canvas construction gives this a luxury feel at an accessible price. Incredible value.
Sharp lines and excellent fabric. The natural stretch is a game-changer for all-day wear.

products.title: Selvedge Denim Jeans
products.shortDescription: Slim-straight jeans in 14oz Japanese selvedge denim.
products.longDescription: Woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan, this raw selvedge denim develops a unique patina over time. Features a slim-straight fit, hidden selvedge coin pocket, leather patch, and YKK hardware. Sanforized to minimize shrinkage. These are jeans built to tell your story.

reviews.text: True Japanese selvedge quality. Three months in and the fading pattern is gorgeous.
Heavy weight denim that softens perfectly. My new everyday jeans.

products.title: Draped Midi Dress
products.shortDescription: Fluid crepe midi dress with asymmetric draping.
products.longDescription: An architectural piece in fluid Japanese crepe with a cowl neckline, asymmetric hem, and concealed back zip. The weighted drape creates effortless movement. Fully lined in silk. Equally striking for gallery openings and candlelit dinners.

reviews.text: The drape is perfection. I've never felt more elegant. Photos don't do it justice.
Worth the investment. The silk lining and crepe quality are top-tier.

products.title: Cashmere Crew Sweater
products.shortDescription: Lightweight Mongolian cashmere in a classic crew neck.
products.longDescription: Knitted from Grade-A Mongolian cashmere with a fine 7-gauge knit for a luxurious hand feel without bulk. Features ribbed trims, saddle shoulder construction for a clean line, and a relaxed fit. The kind of essential that elevates everything you pair it with.

reviews.text: The softest sweater I've ever owned. Mongolian cashmere is on another level.
Bought three colors. The quality justifies the price completely.

products.title: Leather Crossbody Bag
products.shortDescription: Vegetable-tanned leather crossbody with brass hardware.
products.longDescription: Hand-finished from full-grain vegetable-tanned Italian leather that develops a rich patina over time. Features an adjustable strap, magnetic flap closure, internal organizer pockets, and solid brass hardware. Compact enough for essentials, refined enough for any occasion.

reviews.text: The leather smell alone is worth it. Beautiful construction and aging.

products.title: Tailored Chino Trousers
products.shortDescription: Slim-fit chinos in brushed stretch cotton twill.
products.longDescription: Cut from a premium brushed cotton-elastane blend for comfort that moves with you. Features a mid-rise waist, slim tapered leg, coin pocket, and clean-finished interior seams. Pre-washed for softness and minimal shrinkage. The bridge between casual and dressed-up.

reviews.text: Perfect fit. The brushed cotton has a luxury feel. My go-to work pants now.
Incredibly comfortable for all-day wear. The stretch is subtle and perfect.

products.title: Silk Blend Blouse
products.shortDescription: Flowing blouse in a silk-viscose blend with concealed placket.
products.longDescription: A refined blouse cut from a lustrous silk-viscose blend that drapes with understated elegance. Features a concealed button placket, French seams throughout, and a relaxed fit with gentle shirring at the cuffs. Equally beautiful tucked in or worn loose.

reviews.text: The silk blend feels incredible on skin. The concealed placket is so elegant.

products.title: Merino Wool Scarf
products.shortDescription: Oversized scarf in superfine Italian merino wool.
products.longDescription: Woven in a heritage mill in Como, Italy, from superfine 19-micron merino wool. The generous dimensions allow for multiple styling options — from classic loop to shoulder wrap. Features hand-rolled edges and a subtle tonal herringbone pattern.

reviews.text: The herringbone pattern is subtle and beautiful. Incredibly warm yet light.
Italian merino quality is unbeatable. This scarf will last years.

products.title: Relaxed Cotton T-Shirt
products.shortDescription: Heavyweight Supima cotton tee with a boxy cut.
products.longDescription: Made from 8oz Supima cotton jersey — substantially heavier than standard tees for a premium drape and opacity. Features a boxy relaxed fit, ribbed crew neck, and double-needle hem. Garment-dyed for a rich, lived-in color that holds wash after wash.

reviews.text: The weight of this tee is perfect. Feels substantial without being stiff.
Bought 5 colors. Best basic tee I've ever found at this price point.

products.title: Oversized Trench Coat
products.shortDescription: Modern oversized trench in water-repellent cotton gabardine.
products.longDescription: Reimagining the classic trench with an oversized silhouette cut from dense cotton gabardine with DWR water-repellent finish. Features storm flap, gun patch, D-ring belt, and raglan sleeves. Horn buttons and a Bemberg cupro lining complete the luxury specification.

reviews.text: The oversized cut is perfectly proportioned. Instantly elevates any outfit.
